title: One Inventory
description: All players share the same inventory slots. Changes made by one player instantly affect everyone
body:
All players share the exact same inventory. Changes made by one player instantly affect everyone's inventory.

This also includes your hunger bar — it is shared as well.

When "keepInventory" is turned off, if Player A dies and drops all their items, the inventories of all other players (B, C, D) will also be emptied — because you're all sharing the same backpack.![haha](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67faabf2dd0f6bffe7946578fa915771954d916f_0.webp)
